content.full_text:
California Fair Political Practices Commission

August 14, 1990

Jules Kerker  
15681 Primrose Ln.  
Westminster, CA 92683

Re: Your Request for Advice  
Our File No. I 90-458

Dear Mr. Kerker:

You have requested advice concerning disbursement of surplus campaign funds under the Political Reform Act (the "Act").1

Under Commission Regulation 18329(c)(4)(A) (copy enclosed), Commission staff may not provide advice regarding past conduct. We have forwarded your letter to the Commission’s Enforcement Division for investigation. Please contact the Enforcement Division at (916) 322-6441 if you have any questions about the complaint procedure.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin  
Acting General Counsel

By: Peggy Bernardy  
Counsel, Legal Division

SH:PB:plh  
Enclosure

1 Government Code Sections 81000-91015. Commission regulations appear at 2 California Code of Regulations Section 18000, et seq. All references to regulations are to Title 2, Division 6 of the California Code of Regulations.
